---
title: "predictors2025"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

```{r}

library(forecast)
library(tidyverse)

growth <- vroom::vroom("CompanyGrowth.csv")
```

```{r}
library(patchwork)

gg_inc <-growth %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Year+((Qrtr-1)*0.25), y = Income))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = 'lm')

gg_prod <-growth %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Year+((Qrtr-1)*0.25), y = Production))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = 'lm')

gg_sav<-growth %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Year+((Qrtr-1)*0.25), y = Savings))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = 'lm')

gg_unem <-growth %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Year+((Qrtr-1)*0.25), y = Unemployment))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = 'lm')

gg_inc + gg_prod + gg_sav + gg_unem
```

```{r}

vars_lst <- list(growth$Income, growth$Production, growth$Savings, growth$Unemployment)

for (i in 1:4){acf(vars_lst[[i]])}


```

```{r}
growth$Time <- growth$Year+((growth$Qrtr-1)*0.25)

X_noInt <- model.matrix( ~ bs(Time, knots = cuts, degree = 3)+dow + Year + mon, data = yt_feature)[,-1]

S <- 365
ts_data <- ts(data = log(yt_feature$MinutesViewed),
              frequency = S)

arima_mdl <- forecast::auto.arima(y = ts_data,
                        xreg = X_noInt)
```
